products.name: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots (Silver)
products.description:
Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are designed in India and produced by some of the finest leather craftsmen, purely handmade with love using the finest Japanese Carbon Fiber layered unilaterally and microfiber leather upper bonded with the genuine leather.

The Boot Shell: Auriga Racing Elite boots are made with 100% carbon fiber and are fully heat moldable. A custom like snug fit ensures that each and every stroke delivers the maximum power to your skates towards the finish line and ultimately to the podium and glory.

Carbon Fiber: Auriga Racing boots are made from high strength Carbon fiber specially sourced from one of the world's top carbon fiber manufacturers in Japan. The layers of carbon fiber are laid down unilaterally giving the maximum utilization of fiber to get strength from it using special kind of resins.
products.short_description: Auriga Racing Elite Inline Skate Boots are a class apart from others. Made with 100% carbon fiber specially outsourced from one of the finest producers of carbon fiber in Japan.
products.feature_description: Premium 100% carbon fiber boots with Japanese craftsmanship

product_type_details.sizes: EU36, EU37, EU38, EU39, EU40, EU41, EU42, EU43, EU44, EU45

products.name: Auriga Racing OCCULT 4X110 Grey Inline Skate Frames
products.description: Auriga Racing OCCULT frames are solid frames, specially designed and engineered for exceptional performance in intense high-speed racing. These frames are ultra-light weight yet possess exceptional stiffness. OCCULT frames are a class apart from its adversaries, weighing merely 175g. Carved out in one piece from a single block of AL7075 and then tempered at T6 level.

products.name: BONES Swiss Ceramic Bearings 8MM 16 Pack
products.description: Bones Swiss Ceramics are in a class by themselves. If you want the best there is, this is it. The ceramic balls are much lighter, harder, stronger, waterproof, and longer lasting than the finest steel balls. Made in Switzerland.

products.name: BONES Ceramic REDS Skateboard Bearings 8 Pack
products.description: Bones Ceramic Super REDS are lighter and provide faster acceleration because the balls weigh much less. They create less friction and are thus faster than Super REDS, with or without lubricant! Ceramic balls will help to re-polish the steel races flat again, providing a self-healing benefit.
products.short_description: Bones Ceramic Super REDS are lighter and provide faster acceleration. Features grade 5, silicon nitride, hot isostatically pressed ceramic balls.
products.feature_description: Self-healing ceramic bearings
